articles.title: Braving Trump tariffs, smartphones ring in growth for India's exports to US
articles.summary: ICRIER study shows exports to the US for products bearing the tariff burden declined by 11.2%, while smartphone exports nearly doubled from $10.6 bn in FY25 to $19.7 bn in FY26

articles.title: Russo brothers are back: Everything Avengers: Doomsday's first trailer reveals
articles.summary: Avengers: Doomsday trailer reveals Doctor Doom and a massive cast. Spider-Man is not officially confirmed — but Sentry is. Here's everything the trailer and cast list reveal about the December film.

articles.title: Government confirms six Indian-flagged vessels are currently west of the Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: Coordinated efforts are underway to facilitate the evacuation of vessels

articles.title: Brezza facelift, Kia Syros EV and a 585 HP Mercedes: The three major car launches this week
articles.summary: Maruti Brezza facelift, Kia Syros EV and Mercedes-AMG E 53 PHEV all launch this week. Here are all three cars, their prices, engines and what makes each one worth watching in India.

articles.title: Royal Enfield’s ₹5.75 lakh bike: Only 25 Indians can own this rare machine
articles.summary: Royal Enfield’s ₹5.75 lakh Shotgun 650 Limited Edition is a rare collector bike with only 100 units worldwide and just 25 for India, featuring custom design and premium details.

articles.title: No internet? No problem: Here's how offline tap-and-pay UPI could soon work at PoS terminals
articles.summary: A reported new capability could allow users to make low-value UPI payments at certified point-of-sale terminals even when both the phone and the payment devices are offline

articles.title: Elon Musk’s new experiment: Tesla launches a bike with no motor, no pedals
articles.summary: Tesla has entered the kids’ mobility market with a ₹19,000 pedal-less balance bike. Discover how Elon Musk’s latest experiment blends design, learning and the Tesla brand appeal.

articles.title: Beyond football: Spain’s FIFA World Cup heroes, their crores, luxury homes and millionaire lifestyles
articles.summary: Spain’s World Cup heroes are football giants and millionaires. From Rodri and Laporte’s ₹289 crore fortunes to Yamal’s rise, explore their net worth, luxury homes and lifestyles.

articles.title: SBI Funds Management listing makes some employees crorepatis; stock debuts at 7% premium to IPO price
articles.summary: SBI Funds Management made a strong debut on Dalal Street today, listing at a premium of around 7% over its IPO price. The stock opened at Rs 610 on the BSE, which is a gain of 6.27% from the issue price of Rs 574, while it listed at Rs 613.30 on the NSE.

articles.title: New warning on oil: Goldman Sachs says crude prices could cross $120 if Strait of Hormuz disruptions continue
articles.summary: In a note dated July 20, Goldman Sachs analysts said, “Escalation in the Middle East and the decline in estimated Persian Gulf flows to below 45% of pre-war levels have pushed oil prices back up.”

articles.title: Gold price prediction today: Why are gold prices under pressure? Check July 21, 2026 outlook
articles.summary: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices continue to be under pressure and downside risks remain, says Praveen Singh, Head Currencies and Commodities, Mirae Asset ShareKhan.

articles.title: 'Ramayana' trailer launch: Why Rishab Rikhiram Sharma's ₹35.8 lakh Ram-inspired watch has everyone talking
articles.summary: While the price tag of Rishab Sharma’s ‘Ram Janmabhoomi’ watch is eye-catching, it is the blend of artistry, symbolism, and technical display that truly elevates the piece.

articles.title: 'Direct violation': Canada vows to protect workers after Trump slaps 50% tariffs on select goods
articles.summary: Canadian Prime Minister Carney stated new US tariffs violate the CUSMA trade agreement. He affirmed continued government support for Canadian workers and businesses. These tariffs target Canadian exports like vehicles and dairy products.

articles.title: HCLTech CEO's salary hiked 67% on-year; here's how much he drew in FY26
articles.summary: C Vijayakumar's total remuneration jumped roughly 67%. His paycheck in FY26 will blow your mind

articles.title: Rupee slips 6 paise against US dollar in early trade
Romal Shetty gets second term at Deloitte India and South Asia
articles.summary: Romal Shetty took over as CEO in April 2023 and has led one of Deloitte India’s fastest growth phases. During his tenure, revenue rose 81 per cent to ₹14,500 crore for the year ended May 2026.

articles.title: Air India's 2-hour cancellation cost it ₹96,000. What this ruling means for every flyer
articles.summary: A last-minute cancellation turned a family trip into a costly ordeal — and the consumer panel made Air India pay for it.

articles.title: Stock market today: Sensex falls over 225 points; Nifty slips below 24,200 in afternoon trade
Delivered food by day, wrote poems by night: This 56-year-old man won China's top literary prize
articles.summary: Born in Jiangsu province, he left school as a teenager because of financial difficulties at home.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Deepinder Goyal: ‘Building a company is not just about...’
articles.summary: Deepinder Goyal is an Indian billionaire entrepreneur best known as the founder of Zomato, India's largest restaurant discovery and food delivery platform. He graduated from IIT Delhi in 2005 with an Integrated M.Tech in Mathematics and Computing.

articles.title: NSE’s Ahimsa index targets cruelty-free investing
articles.summary: NSE Indices has launched the Nifty 500 Ahimsa Index for investors. This new gauge includes companies that do not harm animals in their business. The index aligns with non-violence principles and excludes certain firms.

articles.title: Ex-tech execs’ startups find favour with VCs, says report
articles.summary: Startups founded by former tech professionals are attracting venture capital investment. These operator-led ventures, though few, are securing a growing share of funding. They consistently receive larger funding rounds and higher valuations compared to others.

articles.title: Hyundai lays groundwork for mass-market EV launch
articles.summary: Hyundai Motor India is expanding charging infrastructure and component localization. The company plans to launch its first mass-market electric SUV this fiscal year. This move targets the affordable, sub-Rs 15 lakh segment of the EV market.

articles.title: Stocks, rupee slide as oil spike fuels pressure
articles.summary: Indian markets closed lower as fluctuating crude prices and global risk-off cues weighed. Banking stocks led the decline after mixed earnings reports from major lenders. The rupee weakened against the dollar due to rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions.

articles.title: At 5% in June, core sector grows fastest in 5 mths
Monetisation of assets helps NHAI pare debt
articles.summary: The National Highways Authority of India has prepaid over Rs 1.2 lakh crore in loans. This accelerated asset monetisation has reduced its overall debt significantly. The authority has not borrowed directly from the market since 2022.

articles.title: No move to scrap LTCG tax on equities: Govt
articles.summary: The government has informed Parliament about no current plans to abolish long-term capital gains tax on equities. Tax policies are revised periodically as part of the annual budgetary process and legislative revisions.

articles.title: Not referring cases to internal ombudsman a concern: RBI
articles.summary: RBI deputy governor Swaminathan J expressed concern over banks bypassing internal ombudsman. He stated that many customer grievances resolved by the RBI ombudsman were never referred internally. This situation undermines the purpose of the internal ombudsman framework, he noted.

articles.title: IndiGo places over 1,000 engines’ order for A320s
articles.summary: IndiGo has placed a record order for over one thousand engines. This significant deal is for their 510 Airbus A320neo family aircraft. CFM International will supply the LEAP-1A engines and establish an MRO facility.

articles.title: Inflow boost: Foreign deposits, swaps draw $21bn in 40 days
articles.summary: Sources undisclosed, mop-up so far 2X speculated amount

articles.title: E20 petrol debate: Govt cites data for 23 crore vehicles, says 'no verified evidence' of widespread engine failure
articles.summary: Minister of State for Petroleum and Natural Gas Suresh Gopi said the shift to E20 fuel has been "phased, calibrated and evidence-based," noting that the ethanol blending rate was gradually raised from 1.53 per cent in 2013-14 to 20 per cent in 2025-26 followin…

articles.title: India's forex boost: RBI's swap scheme raises $20.72 billion so far
articles.summary: The Reserve Bank of India's special swap facility attracted $20.72 billion by July 17. Most of this money arrived through Foreign Currency Non-Resident deposits. Overseas Foreign Currency Borrowings and External Commercial Borrowings also contributed to inflows.

articles.title: Coca-Cola adds fizz to India bottling unit IPO plan, appoints JPMorgan & Citi as bankers
articles.summary: Coca-Cola's Indian bottling unit IPO plans are advancing. JPMorgan and Citi have been appointed to manage the proposed 2027 listing. The company is also exploring the sale of a portion of its stake. This move aligns with Coca-Cola's global asset-light strategy.

articles.title: Fresh threat to global oil supply: Saudi Arabia’s crude exports at risk as Yemen’s Houthis look to impose maritime blockade
articles.summary: Relations between Saudi Arabia and the Houthis have deteriorated since last week after Riyadh carried out an attack on Sana'a airport.

articles.title: Behind the reduction in workforce in India’s top three private sector banks
articles.summary: At ICICI Bank, the country’s second largest lender, total number of employees have come down by around 6,633 to 1,24,324 in FY26, from 1,30,957 employees a year earlier, the annual report.

articles.title: Midnight munchies to 1am cravings: Here's what India ordered during the FIFA World Cup 2026 final
articles.summary: While major cities remained active, some of the sharpest spikes in orders came from smaller football-loving towns. Hosur recorded the highest increase in finals-night orders, with demand jumping 41.9% over a regular weekend.

articles.title: Justin Bieber and Shakira aren't getting paid for the World Cup final — here's why they said yes anyway
articles.summary: Justin Bieber, Shakira and Post Malone won't be paid to perform at the 2026 World Cup final — just like the Super Bowl. Here's why a billion-person audience is worth more than any fee.

articles.title: Blame it on the IndiGo fiasco? Air ticket refund complaints up 233% in 2025
articles.summary: The number of refund-related complaints reported by airlines stood at more than 4,300 in 2025, the highest in the past four years.

articles.title: Messi in tears after World Cup final loss: Will he come back for 2030? Here's what we know
articles.summary: Spain beat Argentina 1-0 AET in the 2026 World Cup final as Messi cried at full-time. He finished with 8 goals and 4 assists but has not ruled out the 2030 World Cup. Here's everything.

articles.title: 2026 Mahindra Scorpio N facelift: Bigger screen, digital cluster and panoramic sunroof incoming
articles.summary: The 2026 Mahindra Scorpio N facelift is expected to bring a 10.25-inch screen, digital cluster, panoramic sunroof and 360-degree camera — while retaining its turbo petrol and diesel engines.
